rulings.Case Title: IN RE: GEORGE LOEW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 30, 2021 line 1. PETITIONERS GEORGE LOEW, JOSEPH MALLON, ANDREW LUSARDI, JANE FRESTON, FLORENCE SURRATT and MARTIN MILLER's Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration is GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: FAST CAPITAL, LLC. ET AL VS. LA COSTA LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Defendants Joint Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 30, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANTS LA COSTA LOANS, INC., RICHARD SHRIGLEY, SS DREAMBUILDERS, LLC, CHONG HONG, SF SAN BRUNO, LLC, LA COSTA LOANS HOLDINGS, LLC, and RICHARD SHRIGLEY JR's Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend is DENIED. The Court has previously addressed the issue of the filing of untimely and unauthorized 5th Amended Complaint after the demurrer to the 4th Amended Complaint was sustained without leave to amend. Pursuant to Court's February 2, 2021 ruling, 5th Amended Complaint filed on December 28, 2020 is the operative complaint in this case. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: FAST CAPITAL, LLC. ET AL VS. LA COSTA LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Prejudgment Order Of Attachment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 30, 2021 line 2. PLAINTIFFS PAUL ARAND, CA CAPITAL FUNDS FOR 284 ROOSEVELT WAY TRUST and CYNTHIA BEGLEY's Notice Of Motion For Prejudgment Order Of Attachment is DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to provide sufficient evidence to establish the amount subject to attachment under the Guarantee. The original amount of the 2013Guarantee without further evidence is insufficient to determine the amount subject to attachment as of March 30, 2021. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Case Title: RODRIGO LOPEZ VS. ALTAS PROPERTY GROUP, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Summary Judgment, Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 30, 2021 line 3. DEFENDANTS ATLAS PROPERTY GROUP, INC., 1830 ALEMANY, LLC and YOSEF TAHBAZOF's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication is continued to May 7, 2021. By no later than April 27, 2021 Plaintiff to file a supplemental opposition (no more than 2 pages) and amended response to separate statement (if applicable) limited solely to the evidence obtained at deposition of Jose Barrios. Defendant shall file a supplemental reply, if any, no later than May 4, 2021. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
